description_long: This is a stylized biplane with a red fuselage and blue double wings, supported by wooden struts and crisscrossed with tension wires. The front features a prominent radial engine with a wooden four-blade propeller, and the engine cowling is metallic gray. The tail section includes a blue horizontal stabilizer and a vertical fin, both with angular, cartoon-like shapes. The landing gear consists of two black wheels mounted on simple struts beneath the lower wing. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the engine, with a small windshield and visible seat. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century aircraft, with exaggerated proportions and a playful, animated appearance.
description: A stylized red and blue biplane with wooden struts, a radial engine and propeller, open cockpit, and cartoon-like proportions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the radial engine, four-blade wooden propeller, and the double blue wings with wooden struts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red fuselage, open cockpit, landing gear, and the angular blue tail fin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue tail assembly, red fuselage, and the structure of the double wings with tension wires.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the propeller, cockpit, landing gear, and tail details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, staggered wings supported by wooden struts and tension wires; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a four-blade wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a small tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the engine with a small windshield.
